member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.GlobalArguments
member.summary: A dictionary-like container for global arguments shared across addon toolbar components.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.GlobalArguments.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets the argument value associated with the given name, raising on change.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.GlobalArguments.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates over all argument name-value pairs.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.IAddon
member.summary: Represents an addon that can register toolbar content, panels, and preview decorators.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.IAddon.Initialize(BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder)
member.summary: Registers the addon's components with the provided .
member.param: The builder used to register addon components.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder
member.summary: Provides methods for registering addon components such as toolbar content, panels, and preview decorators.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder.AddToolbarContent``1(System.Int32,System.Func{BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Registers a toolbar content component shown when the current view mode matches.
member.param: The display order of the toolbar content relative to others.
A predicate that determines whether this content is shown for a given view mode.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder.AddPanel``1(System.Int32,System.Func{BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Registers a panel component shown in the addon panel area when the current view mode matches.
member.param: The display order of the panel relative to others.
A predicate that determines whether this panel is shown for a given view mode.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder.AddPreviewDecorator``1
member.summary: Registers a preview decorator component that wraps the story preview.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonStore
member.summary: Provides a registration point for implementations.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonStore.Register``1
member.summary: Registers an addon of type with the store.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.AddonManager
member.summary: Manages the registration and retrieval of addon toolbar content, panels, and preview decorators.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.AddonManager.Initialize(BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.AddonStore)
member.summary: Initializes all addons registered in the given .
member.param: The store containing the addons to initialize.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.AddonManager.GetToolbarContents(BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode)
member.summary: Returns the toolbar content descriptors that match the given view mode, ordered by Order.
member.param: The current view mode to filter by.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.AddonManager.GetPanels(BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode)
member.summary: Returns the panel descriptors that match the given view mode, ordered by Order.
member.param: The current view mode to filter by.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.AddonManager.GetPreviewDecorators
member.summary: Returns all registered preview decorator descriptors.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.AddonStore
member.summary: The default implementation of that holds registered instances.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.AddonStore.Register``1
member.summary: Creates and stores a new instance of .

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.PanelDescriptor
member.summary: Describes a registered addon panel component, including its order, visibility predicate, and component type.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.PanelDescriptor.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Func{BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode,System.Boolean},System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The display order relative to other panels.
A predicate that determines whether this panel is visible for a given view mode.
The Blazor component type used to render the panel.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.PreviewDecoratorDescriptor
member.summary: Describes a registered preview decorator component that wraps the story canvas preview.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.PreviewDecoratorDescriptor.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The Blazor component type used as the preview decorator.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.ToolbarContentDescriptor
member.summary: Describes a registered toolbar content component, including its order, visibility predicate, component type, and global arguments.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.Internals.ToolbarContentDescriptor.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Func{BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode,System.Boolean},System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The display order relative to other toolbar content.
A predicate that determines whether this content is visible for a given view mode.
The Blazor component type used to render the toolbar content.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.PanelTitle
member.summary: A Blazor component that projects its content into the section outlet used to render a panel's tab title.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.PanelTitle.PanelDescriptor
member.summary: The descriptor of the panel whose title section this component targets.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.PanelTitle.ChildContent
member.summary: The content rendered as the panel tab title.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode
member.summary: Specifies the current display mode of the BlazingStory canvas.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode.Docs
member.summary: The documentation page view.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode.Story
member.summary: The individual story canvas view.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.ViewMode.CustomPage
member.summary: A custom page view defined by the user.
